label: Get Posting Limits
description: Check daily posting limits and current usage per platform. Returns cap, used count, and remaining posts for each platform. When the backend endpoint is unavailable, returns known hard caps with unknown usage.

inputs.description: Row variable for Upload Post user identifier

outputs.description: Saves { limits: { tiktok: { used: 3, cap: 15, remaining: 12 }, ... }, capsOnly: false }

formSchema.label: User variable key
formSchema.hint: Upload Post user identifier. Required for actual usage counts.

formSchema.label: Platforms to check
formSchema.hint: Comma-separated. Supports: instagram, tiktok, linkedin, youtube, facebook, twitter, threads, pinterest, reddit, bluesky.
